congenital sensorineural deafness, retinitis pigmentosa with night blindness, nephronophthisis causing renal failure, and vestibular dysfunction leading to balance problems and falls
short stature, corneal clouding, joint stiffness, herniated lumbar discs, kyphoscoliosis, coarse facies, cardiac valve thickening, respiratory insufficiency, and hepatomegaly
epilepsy, intellectual disability, autistic features, adenoma sebaceum, shagreen patches, ungual fibromas, hyperextensible fingers, retinal hamartomas, angiomyelina, and kidney cysts
psychomotor regression, irritability, hyperreflexia, spasticity, tremors, nystagmus, hearing loss, and delayed myelinization
acroparesthesias, angiokeratomas, corneal verticillata, hypertension, tinnitus, decreased sweating, and microangiopathic hemolytic anemia
muscle weakness, hypotonia, macroglossia, feeding difficulties, hepatomegaly, liver steatosis, and pulmonary involvement
stereotyped hand movements, breathing irregularities, growth deceleration, severe mental and motor deterioration after normal early development, and autonomic instability
progressive neurological decline including behavior changes, learning disabilities, sleep disorders, and seizures; characteristic facial appearance, joint rigidity, and heart defects
diabetes inspidus, diabetes mellitus, optic atrophy, peripheral neuropathy, and deafness
